title: Chocolate Avocado Mousse
description: A silky, naturally sweetened mousse made from ripe avocado — rich, cool, and topped with fresh strawberry.
steps: Scoop avocado flesh into a food processor.
Add maple syrup, cacao powder, vanilla, and sea salt.
Blend until completely smooth, scraping down sides as needed.
Add almond milk a tablespoon at a time if too thick.
Chill for 20 minutes, then serve topped with sliced strawberry.

title: Dragon Fruit Pink Pancakes
description: Fluffy naturally-pink pancakes colored with dragon fruit, served with fresh dragon fruit salad and mint.
ingredients: 1 tbsp dragon fruit powder (or 1/4 cup fresh dragon fruit, pureed)
diced dragon fruit and mint, to serve
steps: Whisk dry ingredients together in a bowl.
Add plant milk, dragon fruit puree/powder, maple syrup, and melted coconut oil.
Mix until just combined — do not overmix.
Cook 1/4-cup portions on a lightly oiled skillet, 2-3 minutes per side.
Serve topped with diced dragon fruit and fresh mint.

title: Turmeric Tofu Scramble
description: A golden, savory tofu scramble spiced with turmeric and black salt, finished with fresh tomato and parsley.
steps: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add crumbled tofu, turmeric, black salt, and garlic powder.
Cook, stirring occasionally, for 6-8 minutes until lightly golden.
Fold in sliced tomatoes for the last minute of cooking.
Plate and garnish with fresh parsley.

title: Garden Turmeric Scramble Bowl
description: The same golden turmeric scramble, served family-style with extra herbs — a grounding start to any morning practice.
ingredients: fresh parsley and cilantro, to garnish
steps: Heat olive oil in a wide pan over medium heat.
Crumble in the tofu and sprinkle with turmeric, smoked paprika, and nutritional yeast.
Cook for 7-9 minutes, stirring gently, until warmed through and lightly crisp at the edges.
Toss in cherry tomatoes just before serving.
Top generously with fresh herbs and serve warm.

title: Cinnamon Spice Loaf
description: A warmly spiced, gluten-free tea loaf with cinnamon and sesame, sliced and finished with strawberry and mint.
ingredients: 1 cup plant milk + 1 tsp apple cider vinegar
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a loaf pan.
Combine plant milk and vinegar, set aside to curdle slightly.
Whisk dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
Add wet ingredients and melted coconut oil, stir until just combined.
Pour into loaf pan, top with sesame seeds, and bake 45-50 minutes.
Cool fully before slicing; serve with fresh strawberry and mint.

title: Lemon Olive Oil Cake
description: A bright, moist gluten-free olive oil cake with fresh lemon, delicate and not-too-sweet.
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and grease a loaf pan.
Whisk olive oil, coconut sugar, lemon zest, and lemon juice together.
Add plant milk and whisk to combine.
Fold in flour, baking powder, and baking soda until just combined.
Pour into pan and bake 40-45 minutes until golden and set.
Cool, slice, and top with fresh strawberry.

title: Vanilla Sesame Loaf
description: A soft, subtly sweet vanilla loaf flecked with black sesame, finished with fresh strawberry, mint, and edible flowers.
ingredients: 1 cup plant milk + 1 tsp apple cider vinegar
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a loaf pan.
Combine plant milk and vinegar; let sit 5 minutes.
Whisk dry ingredients in a large bowl.
Add wet ingredients and vanilla, stirring until just combined.
Fold in black sesame seeds, reserving a pinch for topping.
Bake 45-50 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean. Cool, slice, and garnish.

title: Chai Spice Bread
description: A cozy chai-spiced quick bread with warming cardamom, ginger, and clove — perfect alongside tea after an evening practice.
ingredients: 2 tsp chai spice blend (cinnamon, cardamom, ginger, clove)
1 cup plant milk + 1 tsp apple cider vinegar
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a loaf pan.
Combine plant milk and vinegar; set aside.
Whisk flour, coconut sugar, chai spices, and baking soda together.
Stir in wet ingredients until just combined.
Pour into pan, top with sesame seeds, and bake 45-50 minutes.
Cool before slicing and serving with fresh strawberry and mint.

title: Turmeric Carrot Elixir
description: A bright, anti-inflammatory carrot and turmeric juice, sipped slow before or after practice.
ingredients: 1 inch fresh turmeric root, juiced (or 1/2 tsp ground turmeric)
steps: Juice the carrots, turmeric, and ginger together.
Stir in fresh orange juice and a pinch of black pepper (helps absorb turmeric).
Pour over ice and garnish with fresh mint.
Sip slowly and enjoy.

title: Baked Lentil & Walnut Bites
description: Savory baked lentil-walnut patties finished with a bright pepper garnish, served over crisp lettuce.
ingredients: diced red bell pepper and lettuce, to serve
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and line a baking sheet.
Mash lentils lightly, leaving some texture.
Mix in walnuts, oat flour, tahini, garlic, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Form into small patties and place on baking sheet.
Bake 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway, until firm and golden.
Serve over lettuce, topped with diced red bell pepper.
